zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian De Berthes於1335年出生在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其時，她的父親Henry Berthes15歲，母親Mrs Henry Berthes16歲。她與Roger de Mainwaring III結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1429年在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾馬爾斯頓聖 包利斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian De Berthes于1335年出生在英国英格兰爾米德列維其时，她的父亲Henry Berthes15岁，母亲Mrs Henry Berthes16岁。她与Roger de Mainwaring III结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1429年在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾馬爾斯頓聖 包利斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berthes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Danish: from a variant of the personal name   Bertel   1. This surname is also found in France (mainly Lorraine).
Altered form of Swedish Bertell or Bertel 2.
French: variant of   Bertel   3 and 4. See also 1 above.

variants.name: Bertel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik.  French Eugenie, Numa.  German Otto.
German and Danish: from a pet form of the personal name   Berthold  .
Swedish: variant of Bertell, from the personal name Bert + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius. Alternatively, of the same origin as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian De Berthes was born in 1335, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Berthes, was 15 and her mother, Mrs Henry Berthes, was 16. She married Roger de Mainwaring III. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1429, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian De Berthes est née en 1335, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Berthes, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Mrs Henry Berthes, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Mainwaring III. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1429, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterrée à St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian De Berthes 1335 in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Berthes 15 und ihre Mutter Mrs Henry Berthes 16. Sie hat Roger de Mainwaring III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1429 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian De Berthes è nata il nel 1335 nel Middlewich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Berthes, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Mrs Henry Berthes, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Mainwaring III. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1429, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolta a St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian De Berthesが1335年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチで生まれた時，父Henry Berthesは15歳，母Mrs Henry Berthesは16歳であった。Roger de Mainwaring IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1429年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマーストンスト プアウル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint James' and Saint Paul's Church, Ma: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마스턴 스트 폴'스 c후르치

ko.lifeSummary: Christian De Berthes(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Berthes(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Henry Berthes(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Roger de Mainwaring III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마스턴 스트 폴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian De Berthes nasceu em 1335, em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Berthes, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Henry Berthes, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Mainwaring III. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1429, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultada em St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Michael and All Angels Church, Mid: ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian De Berthes родилась в 1335 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Berthes было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Henry Berthes, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Mainwaring III. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1429 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и была похоронена в местности ст поул'с чурч, марстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian De Berthes nació en 1335, en Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Berthes, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Mrs Henry Berthes, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Roger de Mainwaring III. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1429, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultada en St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
